name: Ascenda WF-03: Item Strategy & Value Validation

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 800, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Generate a concise retail readiness assessment for brand ' + $json.brandName + '. Readiness Score: ' + $json.readinessScore + '/100. Category: ' + $json.category + '. Revenue: ' + $json.revenue + '. Target Retailer: ' + $json.retailer + '. Value Advantage score: ' + $json.readinessComponents.valueAdvantage + '/25. Pricing Fit: ' + $json.readinessComponents.pricingFit + '/25. Operational Readiness: ' + $json.readinessComponents.operationalReadiness + '/20. Format: Executive Summary (2 sentences), Strengths (3 bullets), Gaps (2 bullets), Top 3 Recommendations. Professional tone.' }] }) }}

parameters.subject: =Readiness Score: {{ $json.brandName }} - {{ $json.readinessScore }}/100
parameters.message:
=

{{ $json.brandName }} - Retail Readiness Assessment

Readiness Score: {{ $json.readinessScore }}/100 | Phase 1 Score: {{ $json.score }}/100

Value Advantage (20% req.){{ $json.readinessComponents.valueAdvantage }}/25
Pricing & Margin Fit{{ $json.readinessComponents.pricingFit }}/25
Operational Readiness{{ $json.readinessComponents.operationalReadiness }}/20
Product Differentiation{{ $json.readinessComponents.differentiation }}/20
Compliance{{ $json.readinessComponents.compliance }}/10

Advancing to Go/No-Go committee review.

meta.description: Stage 2 - Item Strategy & Value Validation. Scores readiness across value advantage, pricing fit, operational readiness, differentiation, and compliance. Triggers Go/No-Go.
